TABLE IV: Comparison of Neural Architecture Search Methods on NAS-Bench-201

Fig. 1: The overview of G-ICSO-NAS. The warm-up stage trains super-net weights W with unchanged architecture weights α; the exploration stage alternates between ICSO-based α updates and gradient-based W updates; the stability stage performs gradient-based optimization with Hoeffding-based early stopping for convergence detection.
Fig. 2: ICSO. a triplet-based competitive swarm optimizer with diversity-aware fitness evaluation.
